sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Company (NYSE: VEL) insider plans sale of 14,840 shares via broker
feed.summary: An insider at Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VEL) has filed a Form 144 to sell 14,840 shares, stemming from restricted stock awards and performance stock units. The filing details a proposed sale of 5,160 shares valued at $93,213.82 through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC on March 17, 2026, as part of a 10b5-1 plan. This insider activity indicates a planned security transaction by a company executive.

feed.title: AVAX-backed VanEck Avalanche ETF (NASDAQ: VAVX) outlines structure, fees and staking
feed.summary: The VanEck Avalanche ETF (VAVX) has detailed its structure, fees, and staking mechanisms in its annual report. The Trust aims to track AVAX's price and staking rewards, less expenses, holding AVAX with institutional custodians and calculating its daily NAV using the MarketVector Avalanche Benchmark Rate. It charges a 0.20% Sponsor Fee, utilizes staking services with Coinbase Crypto Services, and handles creations/redemptions in 25,000-Share Baskets as a grantor trust for tax purposes.

feed.title: [424B2] UBS AG Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to the common stock of Charter Communications, Inc., maturing around April 3, 2028. These notes provide periodic contingent coupons if the underlying stock's closing level meets a coupon barrier, and are automatically called if it reaches or exceeds an initial level. Investors face downside market risk, potentially losing principal if the final level falls below a specified downside threshold, and all payments are subject to UBS’s creditworthiness.

feed.title: Journal of Urology Publishes ENVISION Trial Results Showing 72.2% 24-Month Duration of Response with ZUSDURI
feed.summary: UroGen Pharma Ltd. announced the publication of pivotal Phase 3 ENVISION trial results for ZUSDURI™ (mitomycin) in The Journal of Urology. The study demonstrated a 72.2% probability of remaining event-free at 24 months after achieving a complete response at three months in adults with recurrent low-grade intermediate-risk non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (LG-IR-NMIBC). ZUSDURI, the first FDA-approved therapy for this condition, offers a non-surgical treatment potentially breaking the cycle of repeated recurrences and surgeries.

feed.title: Rule 144: Richard D. Peterson sells 1,855 shares (UVE)
feed.summary: Richard D. Peterson, affiliated with Universal Insurance Holdings, Inc. (UVE), filed a Rule 144 notice to sell restricted common stock. The filing discloses a Restricted Stock Award of 2,000 shares granted on June 10, 2022, and indicates that 1,855 shares were sold on December 30, 2025. This is a routine administrative filing for the disposition of previously issued restricted shares.

feed.title: Uniti Group Inc (UNIT) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart | Capital.com Australia
feed.summary: This page on Capital.com Australia provides a stock price quote and current price chart for Uniti Group Inc (UNIT). It details CFD trading conditions, including spread, overnight funding adjustments, margin requirements, and commission. The article also lists key historical price statistics and links to other market analyses.

feed.title: Medford Hawk offers $5.50 to buy Urgent.ly (NASDAQ: ULY)
feed.summary: Medford Hawk, a wholly owned subsidiary of Agero, Inc., has launched a tender offer to acquire all outstanding shares of Urgent.ly (NASDAQ: ULY) for $5.50 per share in cash. This offer is detailed in a Schedule TO filing, which incorporates an Offer to Purchase dated March 30, 2026, and an Agreement and Plan of Merger dated March 13, 2026. As of March 26, 2026, Urgent.ly had 2,196,934 shares outstanding, along with various equity awards.

feed.title: TXMD: Net loss narrowed and license revenue surged as strategic alternatives are explored
feed.summary: TherapeuticsMD (TXMD) reported a narrowed net loss from continuing operations to $(0.7) million for 2025, while license revenue significantly increased by 71.6% to $3.0 million. The company is actively evaluating strategic alternatives but faces risks related to licensee performance, regulatory changes, and ongoing disputes. This financial improvement comes as TXMD explores its long-term strategic direction.

feed.title: TherapeuticsMD (NASDAQ: TXMD) reports 2025 results, weighs strategic options
feed.summary: TherapeuticsMD (NASDAQ: TXMD) reported its full-year 2025 financial results, showing a net loss of $(0.7) million and license revenues of $3.0 million, an increase of 71.6% from 2024. The company, which transitioned to a pharmaceutical royalty business in December 2022, is actively evaluating strategic alternatives including mergers, acquisitions, or asset sales. TherapeuticsMD emphasizes risks associated with licensee performance, ongoing disputes, and its ability to maintain its Nasdaq listing.

feed.title: TXMD: 2025 saw improved results from royalty revenue, but litigation and liquidity risks threaten viability
feed.summary: TherapeuticsMD (TXMD) transitioned to a royalty-only model in 2025, reporting $3.0M in license revenue but also a net loss of $569K. The company faces significant going concern doubts due to ongoing litigation with Mayne Pharma and its reliance on royalty income. Future sustainability hinges on securing additional financing and growing its royalty streams.

feed.title: Ubiquiti Inc (UI) Trading Down 5.12% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Ubiquiti Inc (UI) shares dropped 5.12% on March 30, closing at $740.00 after hitting an intraday low of $727.22. The stock is 13.35% below its 52-week high but 190.20% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Hold" status with an average target price of $623.50, suggesting a potential downside of 15.74% from current levels.

feed.title: Unity Software Inc (U) Shares Up 5.45% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Unity Software Inc. (U) shares rose by 5.45% to $20.51 on March 30, trading 60.67% below its 52-week high and 33.79% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts predict an average target price of $33.88, implying a 65.17% upside, with a consensus "Outperform" rating. GuruFocus estimates a fair value (GF Value) of $29.30, suggesting a 42.86% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X Shares Options Spot-On: On March 30th, 86,788 Contracts Were Traded, With 805.22K Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 30th ET, Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X Shares (TSLL.US) saw significant options trading with 86,788 contracts traded, comprised of 27.44% put options and 72.56% call options. The open interest for TSLL totaled approximately 805.22K contracts, representing 94.19% of the average over the past 30 trading days. A notable transaction involved 1,100 put options with a strike price of $13.00 expiring on May 8th, 2026, generating $247.5K in turnover when TSLL was trading at $11.48.

feed.title: TIM posts audited 2025 annual report after SEC and Brazil filing
feed.summary: TIM S.A. (NYSE: TIMB) announced the filing of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with both the U.S. SEC and the Brazilian CVM on March 30, 2026. This report includes audited financial statements, Sarbanes-Oxley certifications, and an audit opinion from Ernst & Young on the financial statements and internal controls. Shareholders can access the document online or request a free hard copy from Investor Relations.

feed.title: TIM S.A. Shareholders Back 2025 Results and Governance Changes at 2026 General Meetings
feed.summary: TIM S.A. shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the company's 2025 financial statements, profit allocation, and several governance changes during its 2026 General Meetings. These changes included amendments to the company's by-laws and the appointment of new board and fiscal council members. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates TIMB as "Outperform" due to its strong financial performance, despite some weaknesses in cash conversion and balance sheet trends.

feed.title: According to the latest filing disclosed by the SEC, existing shareholders of biopharmaceutical company Tempest Therapeutics Inc. plan to resell up to 8.27 million shares of the company's common stock.
feed.summary: Existing shareholders of biopharmaceutical company Tempest Therapeutics Inc. plan to resell up to 8.27 million shares of common stock, as disclosed in a recent SEC filing. This move is a proactive effort by the selling shareholders to exit partial investments, with the company itself not receiving any direct financing proceeds from the resale. Tempest Therapeutics, an oncology therapeutic company, noted that the specific transactions will occur based on market conditions, potentially drawing attention to its capital structure.

feed.title: TRUP (NASDAQ: TRUP) Rule 144: insider sales of 5,713 shares reported
feed.summary: Trupanion (NASDAQ: TRUP) filed a Rule 144 notice detailing planned sales of restricted common stock and disclosing past sales by John Gallagher. The filing indicates 430 shares of restricted stock from May 25, 2023, and 180 shares from February 25, 2023, are slated for sale. It also reports two prior sales by John Gallagher totaling 5,713 shares, executed on February 27, 2026, and January 28, 2026, for a combined value of $153,698.43.

feed.title: Tempest Therapeutics (NASDAQ: TPST) registers 8.27M shares for resale by sellers
feed.summary: Tempest Therapeutics (NASDAQ: TPST) has registered 8,268,495 shares of common stock for resale by existing selling stockholders. These shares were issued as consideration in an Asset Purchase Agreement dated November 19, 2025, for the acquisition of CAR-T and related assets. The company will not receive any proceeds from these resales, which will be conducted by the named selling stockholders, including Matthew Angel and Lotus Capital (BVI) Limited.

feed.title: Trustmark (NASDAQ: TRMK) names Tom Owens COO and Joe Bond CFO
feed.summary: Trustmark Corporation has announced key leadership changes, effective May 1, 2026. Thomas C. Owens will transition from his current financial officer roles to become Chief Operating Officer of Trustmark Bank, while Joseph E. Bond will succeed him as Treasurer and Principal Financial Officer of Trustmark Corporation and Chief Financial Officer of Trustmark Bank. Both executives will receive significant compensation packages, including stock awards and competitive salaries, as detailed in the SEC filing.

feed.title: Luxury homebuilder plans 118-home community near Parker
feed.summary: Toll Brothers is planning a new 118-home community called MeadowRock near Parker, Colorado. The homes will range from 3,353 to 6,073 square feet and be priced starting at $1.4 million. The announcement was made by Justyna Tomtas of the Denver Business Journal.

feed.title: Browns Ferry Nuclear plant unit 3 has returned, powering homes and businesses in Tennessee Valley
feed.summary: Browns Ferry Nuclear Plant Unit 3 has returned to the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) electric grid after a scheduled refueling and maintenance outage. With all three units now operational, the plant can produce over 3,000 megawatts of electricity, sufficient to power more than 2 million homes and businesses across the Tennessee Valley.

feed.title: TFI International Sets Date for First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Webcast
feed.summary: TFI International announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 27, 2026, after market close, followed by a webcast with its Chairman and CEO Alain Bédard and CFO David Saperstein. This move signifies TFI's commitment to transparency for investors regarding its less-than-truckload, truckload, and logistics businesses. While TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates TFII as "Neutral" due to mixed financial signals, the company aims to engage a broad base of analysts and shareholders through this communication.

feed.title: TFI International (NYSE: TFII) plans Q1 2026 results webcast April 27
feed.summary: TFI International Inc. (NYSE and TSX: TFII) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 27, 2026, after market close. The North American transportation and logistics company will also host a webcast on the same day at 5:00 PM Eastern Time, where CEO Alain Bédard and CFO David Saperstein will discuss the results. The live webcast and replay will be available in the Investors section of the company’s website.

feed.title: Tenet appoints J. Michael Grooms as SVP & Controller; R. Scott Ramsey to retire
feed.summary: Tenet Healthcare has appointed J. Michael Grooms as Senior Vice President & Controller, succeeding R. Scott Ramsey who is set to retire on April 30, 2026. Ramsey will continue part-time until March 31, 2028, ensuring a smooth transition. Grooms, who previously served as SVP and Chief Accounting Officer at Lifepoint, will assume the Principal Accounting Officer role effective May 1, 2026, with a base salary of $475,000 and additional compensation details outlined.

feed.title: Veteran executive Susan Salka joins Teladoc Health (NYSE: TDOC) board
feed.summary: Teladoc Health (NYSE: TDOC) has appointed Susan R. Salka, former president and CEO of AMN Healthcare Services, to its board of directors, effective March 30, 2026. Ms. Salka will serve on the audit and compensation committees, bringing extensive healthcare leadership and financial expertise to the company. Her experience, including orchestrating 26 acquisitions and growing AMN's revenue to over $5 billion, is expected to contribute significantly to Teladoc Health's strategic growth and outcomes-focused care.

feed.title: Teladoc Health appoints Susan Salka to board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: Teladoc Health has appointed Susan Salka, former president and CEO of AMN Healthcare Services, to its board of directors. Salka will serve on the audit and compensation committees, bringing extensive healthcare leadership and governance experience. This appointment follows board retirements and comes as Teladoc faces financial headwinds, with its stock down 27% year-to-date, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd (TEVA) Shares Down 3.49% on M
feed.summary: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd (TEVA) shares dropped 3.49% on March 30, reaching an intraday low of $28.63 before closing slightly higher at $28.74. This places the stock 23.04% below its 52-week high but 130.57% above its 52-week low. Analyst forecasts suggest an average target price of $38.06, indicating a 32.41% upside, while GuruFocus's GF Value estimate of $17.59 suggests a potential downside of 38.8%.

feed.title: TD (TD) issues leveraged barrier notes tied to EFA and SX5E with 210.25% leverage
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank is offering 5-year Leveraged Barrier Notes linked to the least performing of the iShares® MSCI EAFE ETF (EFA) and the EURO STOXX 50® Index (SX5E). These notes provide 210.25% leveraged participation in positive returns, but investors risk losing their entire principal if either reference asset falls below 65% of its initial value. The notes are unsecured, non-interest-bearing senior debt, and their estimated value at pricing was $952.20 per $1,000 note, reflecting structuring costs and hedging.

feed.title: Theravance (NASDAQ: TBPH) sets 2039 generic date in YUPELRI patent settlement
feed.summary: Theravance Biopharma, Inc. announced a settlement of patent litigation concerning its YUPELRI® (revefenacin) inhalation solution with Mankind Pharma. This agreement grants Mankind Pharma a royalty-free, non-exclusive license to sell a generic YUPELRI in the U.S. beginning April 23, 2039. The resolution clarifies the long-term exclusivity of YUPELRI and eliminates legal uncertainties, though it is subject to review by U.S. antitrust authorities.

feed.title: Merck to buy Terns Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: TERN) for $53 per share in cash
feed.summary: Terns Pharmaceuticals is being acquired by Merck Sharp & Dohme LLC for $53 per share in cash, a deal that would make Terns a wholly-owned Merck subsidiary and delist its stock. The acquisition highlights Terns' lead oncology asset, TERN-701 for chronic myeloid leukemia, which has shown promising Phase 1/2 trial data. Terns ended 2025 with strong liquidity of $1.02 billion in cash and marketable securities but continues to report net losses, financing operations primarily through equity offerings.

feed.title: TaskUs (NASDAQ: TASK) CCO converts 28,338 RSUs; 7,293 shares withheld for taxes, holds 61,536 shares
feed.summary: TaskUs Chief Customer Officer Jarrod Johnson exercised 28,338 restricted stock units (RSUs) into Class A common shares on March 26, 2026. To cover tax obligations, 7,293 shares were withheld at $6.54 per share. After these transactions, Johnson directly holds 61,536 Class A common shares, with no open-market sales reported.

feed.title: TaskUs (NASDAQ: TASK) president nets shares after RSU vesting
feed.summary: TaskUs president Jaspar Weir exercised 13,242 restricted stock units (RSUs) into Class A common shares. These RSUs convert one-for-one into common stock with a $0.00 exercise price, and 3,225 Class A shares were withheld at $6.54 per share to cover tax obligations. After these transactions, Weir directly holds 1,035,891 Class A shares, with additional shares held indirectly through family trusts.

feed.title: BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. Sued for Securities Law Violations – Investors Should Contact Levi & Korsinsky for More Information – TCPC
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a class action securities lawsuit against BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC) on behalf of investors who suffered losses due to alleged securities fraud between November 6, 2024, and January 23, 2026. The lawsuit claims that the company made false statements and concealed information regarding the valuation of its investments, the effectiveness of its portfolio restructuring, and the understatement of unrealized losses, leading to an overstatement of net asset value. Investors have until April 6, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Blackrock Tcp Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:TCPC) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Blackrock TCP Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:TCPC) experienced a significant 22% increase in short interest in March, totaling 5,144,286 shares, or approximately 6.1% of its outstanding shares. The company reported a missed earnings per share for the last quarter and a negative net margin, leading to a consensus "Strong Sell" rating from analysts with a $3.50 price target. Despite a high dividend yield of 19.2%, its payout ratio is negative at -64.76%, further contributing to a weak fundamental and sentiment outlook.

feed.title: Tamboran Resources Is Maintained at Overweight by Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has reiterated its "Overweight" rating on Tamboran Resources, indicating a positive outlook for the company's stock. This maintenance of rating suggests that Wells Fargo analysts continue to view Tamboran Resources as a favorable investment opportunity.

feed.title: Inside Omnicom’s $17 billion machine: How the advertising giant books revenue
feed.summary: Omnicom (OMC) generated $17.3 billion in revenue in 2025, driven by a complex model that combines long-term service contracts, media-based transactions, and performance-tied variable incentives. The company recognizes revenue over time for continuous services, at specific points for media commissions, and differentiates between acting as a principal or an agent in transactions, which affects how revenue is reported (gross vs. net). Media remains the most significant growth driver, and Omnicom's model reflects the intricate nature of modern marketing services, integrating predictability with performance-based estimation.

feed.title: Generation Essentials Group (TGE) CEO files initial insider ownership report
feed.summary: Generation Essentials Group (TGE) CEO Baudo Giampietro has filed an initial insider ownership report on Form 3. This filing officially identifies Giampietro as an officer and establishes him as a reporting person for future insider transaction disclosures, though no stock transactions were reported in this initial filing. The Form 3 is crucial for transparency, setting the groundwork for future reporting of changes in his beneficial ownership of TGE securities.

feed.title: Talkspace (NASDAQ:TALK) Sets New 52-Week High - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Talkspace (NASDAQ:TALK) shares recently hit a new 52-week high of $5.19 during mid-day trading on Monday, closing at $5.18 on heavy volume. This rise follows a quarterly earnings beat, with the company reporting $0.03 EPS against an estimated $0.02 and revenue of $63.0M. Despite the strong performance, analyst consensus remains a "Hold" with an average target price of $5.56, largely due to several recent downgrades.

feed.title: Stratasys Direct joins military additive pilot program
feed.summary: Stratasys Direct has been selected to participate in the U.S. Department of War’s (DoW) Joint Additive Manufacturing Acceptability (JAMA) IV Pilot Parts Program. This multimillion-dollar effort focuses on qualifying and deploying 3D-printed parts for military platforms and defense supply chains. Stratasys Direct, already a supplier of qualified production parts to defense organizations, will contribute to expanding additive manufacturing use in aerospace and defense production, driven by increasing military demand for accuracy, scalability, and supply chain resilience.

feed.title: Sale-leaseback of Texas and Utah sites at Star Equity (NASDAQ: STRR)
feed.summary: Star Equity Holdings, through its subsidiary Alliance Drilling Tools, completed sale-leaseback transactions for two properties in Texas and Utah on March 27, 2026, for a total of $1.69 million. Alliance Drilling Tools then entered into 20-year triple net leases for both properties, with Star Equity guaranteeing the leases and Alliance Drilling Tools being responsible for all property-related expenses. This financing arrangement allows Star Equity to free up cash while continuing to use the assets.

feed.title: New financings back 60 Degrees Pharma (NASDAQ: SXTP) infectious disease pipeline
feed.summary: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: SXTP) has secured several multi-million-dollar equity financings from 2024 to 2026 to support its infectious disease pipeline. The company is actively developing tafenoquine for various new indications, including babesiosis and lung infections, while also marketing Arakoda for malaria prevention. These funding initiatives involve at-the-market offerings and registered direct offerings, enabling the expansion of clinical trials and commercialization efforts.

feed.title: [ARS] S&T BANCORP INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS filing by S&T BANCORP INC (STBA) on March 30, 2026, which is available as a PDF document. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides a brief overview of STBA's market data, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces Vessel Sale Agreements
feed.summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. has announced agreements to sell two 2015-built scrubber-fitted MR product tankers, STI Brooklyn and STI Black Hawk, for $35.0 million each, with the sales expected to close in the second quarter of 2026. The company currently owns 89 product tankers and also has agreements for the sale of an LR2 and four MR product tankers, as well as newbuilding agreements for several MR, LR2, and VLCC tankers to be delivered between 2026 and 2029.

feed.title: Scorpio Tankers (NYSE: STNG) signs $35M‑per‑ship MR sales amid fleet renewal
feed.summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE: STNG) announced agreements to sell two 2015-built MR product tankers, STI Brooklyn and STI Black Hawk, for $35.0 million each, with sales expected to close in Q2 2026. This move is part of the company's continuous fleet renewal strategy, which also includes the sale of additional tankers and the ordering of multiple newbuild vessels (MR, LR2, and VLCC) scheduled for delivery between 2026 and 2029. The company currently operates a fleet of 89 product tankers with an average age of 10.1 years.

feed.title: SS&C Technologies (NASDAQ: SSNC) director exercises options, now holds 86,424 shares
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings Inc. director David Varsano exercised stock options to acquire 6,000 shares of Common Stock at $30.445 per share. Following this transaction, Varsano directly holds 86,424 shares of Common Stock. The exercised stock options were fully vested as of their grant date.

feed.title: Spark I Acquisition (Nasdaq: SPKL) details SPAC status, Kneron talks and going-concern risk
feed.summary: Spark I Acquisition (SPKL), a Cayman Islands-based SPAC, has outlined its financial status and ongoing discussions to complete a business combination. The company reported a significant working capital deficit and minimal cash outside its trust as of December 31, 2025, leading its auditor to express substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern. Spark I is actively negotiating a binding business combination agreement with Kneron Holding Corporation and must finalize a deal or liquidate by September 29, 2026.

feed.title: McDonald's Corporation Stock: Analyzing the Global Fast Food Giant's Business Model, Competitive Edge, and Investor Opportunities in 2026
feed.summary: This article analyzes McDonald's Corporation (MCD) stock, focusing on its franchise-heavy business model, global footprint, and competitive advantages. It highlights the company's predictable cash flows, strong real estate portfolio, and emphasis on digital and drive-thru innovations, positioning it as a stable investment. The piece also discusses risks such as labor shortages, inflation, and changing consumer preferences, advising investors to monitor U.S. comparable sales and digital adoption.
